query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS regional_rate_adjustments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  postcode_start VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,
  postcode_end VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,
  region_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  region_type ENUM('metro', 'regional', 'remote', 'very_remote') NOT NULL,
  state VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  labour_multiplier DECIMAL(4,2) DEFAULT 1.00,
  material_multiplier DECIMAL(4,2) DEFAULT 1.00,
  travel_surcharge DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
